title: Metals Slump As Fears Of Weak Demand In China Linger
section_path: Metals Slump As Fears Of Weak Demand In China Linger
section_path_text: Metals Slump As Fears Of Weak Demand In China Linger
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A risk off tone across markets saw commodity markets come under pressure. This was exacerbated by worsening outbreaks of COVID-19 in China, raising fears of further lockdowns weakening demand. Base metal markets reopened in London in a bearish mood amid concerns of virus lockdowns in China hurting demand.
